info.title: Ecommerce-buildTime
info.description: API documentation for Ecommerce-buildTime, a platform providing comprehensive e-commerce solutions including product management, order processing, and customer interactions.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product management, including creation, update, retrieval, and deletion of product information.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Endpoints for managing customer orders, processing payments, and tracking order status.

tags.name: customers
tags.description: Functionality to handle customer information, profiles, and authentication.

post.description: Create a new user account by providing necessary user details in the request body. Returns the registered user's information upon success.

example.message: The provided user registration data is invalid.
A user with the provided email or username already exists.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for a user
post.description: Places a new order associated with the specified user ID. Returns the details of the newly created order.

example.message: The order placement request is malformed or missing required data.
No user found with the provided userId.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve order details by order ID
get.description: Fetch detailed information about an order using its unique orderId. Returns the full order data if found.

example.message: The provided order ID is invalid.

404.description: Order not found for the given ID

example.message: No order found with the specified order ID.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to user's cart
post.description: Adds a specified item to the shopping cart of the user identified by userId. Returns the updated cart contents.

example.message: The cart item data provided is invalid.

details.issue: Quantity must be greater than zero

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Get the contents of a user's cart
get.description: Retrieve current items and details in the shopping cart for the specified user.

400.description: Invalid user ID for cart retrieval

example.message: The provided userId is invalid for cart retrieval.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Track the shipment status of a specific order
get.description: Retrieve the current tracking information for an order identified by orderId. This endpoint provides real-time shipment status, location updates, and estimated delivery time for the requested order.

example.message: No tracking information found for the specified orderId.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Create a new product entry in the product catalog by providing detailed product information such as name, description, price, and availability. On success, returns the created product details including product ID.

requestBody.description: The product details to create a new product

example.name: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
example.description: Over-ear wireless headphones with noise cancellation and 20 hours battery life.

example.message: The product data submitted is invalid or incomplete.

details.issue: Price must be a positive number

409.description: Product with the same SKU already exists

example.message: A product with the provided SKU already exists.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Receive and process payment gateway webhook notifications
post.description: This endpoint receives asynchronous webhook notifications from payment gateways. The request body contains payment event details such as payments, refunds, and disputes which are processed to update the payment system accordingly.

requestBody.description: Payment event payload sent by the payment gateway

400.description: Bad request due to malformed webhook payload

example.message: The webhook payload is invalid or improperly formatted.

402.description: Payment required or payment status error

example.message: Payment could not be processed or is required.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Start a payment process by submitting payment details such as amount, currency, and payment method. Returns a payment confirmation or transaction status upon success.

requestBody.description: Details required to initiate a payment

example.message: The payment request data is incomplete or invalid.

details.issue: Card number is invalid or missing

example.message: The payment was declined by the payment processor.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for the payment transaction

gatewayResponse.description: Response message from the payment gateway

transactionId.description: Transaction identifier provided by the payment gateway

totalAmount.description: Total amount of the order before discounts

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to the order

userId.description: Identifier of the user who placed the order

items.description: List of items included in the order

payableAmount.description: Final amount to be paid after discounts

paymentStatus.description: Current payment status of the order

status.description: Current processing status of the order

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the order

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user was created

active.description: Indicates if the user's account is active

userType.description: Type or role of the user

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the user's record

rating.description: Average customer rating for the product

description.example: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI

currency.description: Currency code for the product price

category.description: Category to which the product belongs

stock.description: Number of items available in stock

quantity.description: The quantity of the product ordered.

price.description: Original price of a single product unit.

finalPrice.description: Final price after discount for the quantity ordered.

quantity.description: Number of units of the product in the cart.

productId.description: Identifier for the product in the cart.

price.description: Unit price before applying any discounts.

finalPrice.description: Total price after discount for the quantity in cart.

productName.description: Product name shown in the cart.

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the tracking status was last updated.

orderId.description: Unique identifier of the order being tracked.

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier or delivery partner handling the shipment.

estimatedDelivery.description: Estimated delivery date of the order.

status.description: Current delivery status of the order.

trackingId.description: Tracking number assigned by the courier.

totalAmount.description: Total amount for all items in the cart before discounts.

totalDiscount.description: Aggregate discount applied on the cart items.

currency.description: Currency used for all monetary values.

userId.description: Identifier for the user owning the cart.

items.description: List of individual items in the user's cart.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the cart was last updated.

amount.description: The total amount to be paid in the specified currency

orderId.description: The unique identifier for the order associated with this payment

paymentMethod.description: The method of payment used such as credit card, PayPal, etc.

currency.description: The currency code in ISO 4217 format for the payment amount

paymentGateway.description: The payment gateway service handling the payment processing

country.description: The country of residence for the user

phone.description: User’s contact phone number in international format

preferredCurrency.description: The preferred currency for transactions by the user

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is currently active

userType.description: The category or role type assigned to the user

email.description: User’s email address for contact and notifications

createdAt.description: The date and time when the payment was created in ISO 8601 format

amount.description: The total amount processed for the payment

orderId.description: Identifier linking the payment to the particular order

paymentId.description: Unique identifier assigned to this payment transaction

paymentMethod.description: Method used to make the payment

currency.description: Currency code used in the payment

transactionId.description: Identifier provided by the payment gateway for the transaction

status.description: Current status of the payment (e.g., completed, pending, failed)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was created in the system

rating.description: Average customer rating of the product between 0 and 5

available.description: Availability status of the product for purchase

description.example: High-quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation and long battery life.

currency.description: Currency code in which the price is denoted

stock.description: Quantity of the product currently in stock

updatedAt.description: Date and time of the last update to the product details

path.description: Request path that caused the error

details.description: Specific details about validation or other errors
